channel.title: Omni
channel.description: Feed on everything. Daily digest of news, podcasts, finance, art, sports, and real estate.
channel.itunes:author: Omni
channel.itunes:summary: Feed on everything. Daily briefings across news, finance, sports, art, real estate, and culture.

item.title: Omni Daily — Monday, June 08, 2026
item.description: Welcome to Omni. Your daily briefing for Monday, June 08, 2026. Feed on everything. Let's get into it. New York Times. The 15-Hour Fight With Iran Showed the Bind Israel Is In. As it braces for a possible U.S.-Iranian peace deal, Israel now knows that if it responds forcefully to attacks by He
item.itunes:summary: Your daily briefing for Monday, June 08, 2026. Feed on everything.

item.title: Omni Daily — Sunday, June 07, 2026
item.description: Welcome to Omni. Your daily briefing for Sunday, June 07, 2026. Feed on everything. Let's get into it. New York Times. Israel Bombs Beirut Outskirts as Fighting With Hezbollah Escalates. U.S. efforts for a truce in Lebanon appear to have stalled. Israel accused Hezbollah of firing at Israeli t
item.itunes:summary: Your daily briefing for Sunday, June 07, 2026. Feed on everything.

item.title: Omni Daily — Saturday, June 06, 2026
item.description: Welcome to Omni. Your daily briefing for Saturday, June 06, 2026. Feed on everything. Let's get into it. New York Times. As Trump Pushes Deportations, a Skyrocketing Caseload Strains Immigration Courts. A federal surge has more than doubled caseloads within some immigration courts nationwide.
item.itunes:summary: Your daily briefing for Saturday, June 06, 2026. Feed on everything.

item.title: Omni Daily — Friday, June 05, 2026
item.description: Welcome to Omni. Your daily briefing for Friday, June 05, 2026. Feed on everything. Let's get into it. New York Times. U.S. Job Market Pushes Past Shocks and Strains. Employers added 172,000 jobs in May, adding to a vigorous pace of hiring in recent months. But wage growth is not keeping up wi
item.itunes:summary: Your daily briefing for Friday, June 05, 2026. Feed on everything.
